elements.text:
You and your friends took some pictures together. You look through your social media feed and see that they tagged you in a post. You don't like how you look in the picture.

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: I don't think I look good in the photo, but I probably look better to other people.
People may not like the picture, but I feel good being appreciated by my friends.
My friends enjoy hanging out with me.
People are going to make fun of how I look.
